title: Shadow Awakening
description: A mod based on the anime Eminence in Shadow
body:
The mod adds Abilities of Shadow from the anime Eminence In Shadow

To access the abilities you need to obtain the Eminent Apple crafted with 1 Enchanted Golden Apple and 8 Mana Slime, Mana Slime can be obtained from **Mana Ore** found in caves between Y = 0 and Y = 64

There are multiple abilities:
1. Standard Atomic:Destroys everything around the player
2. Recovery Atomic:Seals and Heals all entities around the player including the player
3. Fake Atomic:Seals and gives invisibility to allow the player to escape sticky situations
4. Armor:Slime Armor can be obtained in the ability menu
5. Sword:Slime sword can also be obtained in the ability menu and spawns lightning upon right click


All abilities require Mana to work, Mana can be regenerated by consuming Eminent Apples, it is the only way (can be changed via commands) to regenerate mana.


There are currently 4 commands in the mod:
1. **/Mana** - Changes the default Mana to whatever you want(Below MaxMana)
2. **/MaxMana** - Changes the default Maximum Mana to whatever you want
3. **/ManaRegen** - Changes the Mana Regeneration Rate to whatever you set, by default it is 0
4. **/LOE** - The Commands stands for "Lord Of Eminence" , setting it to true can give access to all abilities and setting it to false revokes access

There are multiple keybinds,
- **Legacy Ability Key** - Allows you to access the legacy menu for ability selection [None]
- **Ability Menu** - Allows you to access the menu for ability selection [R]
- **Nav Left and Nav Right** - it allows you to quickly change abilities using keys [A and D]
- **Ability Key** - Allows you to use selected ability [ \ ]
- **Ability Enable** - Allows you to enable or disable abilities [NumPad 0]

### All keybind are meant to be changed
